overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a richly furnished interior room, exiting to a sunlit balcony overlooking a scenic lake and mountain vista, descending stone stairs, and entering a populated courtyard area in the city of Beauclair.

scene_state.functional_zone: furnished interior room with wooden decor

agents.ego_description: walking around the room examining furniture and decor, moving toward the exit door

entered.detail: dark wooden dresser with multiple drawers against the left wall
tall arched mirror with candles mounted on the wall above a console table
large window with diamond-patterned leaded glass panes showing greenery outside
tall potted plant with orange flowers near the right wall
wooden storage chest at the foot of the bed
framed landscape painting depicting mountains and sunset
small wooden table with a bowl placed on top near the window
wooden door with colorful stained glass panels leading to the balcony

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores a cozy, well-appointed interior room with wooden furniture, a large window, and warm lighting. He moves around the space examining the decor before approaching a stained glass door at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone balcony overlooking lake and mountains

events.description: exits the interior room through the stained glass door onto the exterior balcony
transitioning from dim interior lighting to bright midday sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone balcony railing, taking in the scenic view of the lake and distant mountains

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with balusters lining the edge of the balcony
expansive view of a bright blue lake surrounded by forested hills
large mountain with snow-covered peak dominating the background
planter boxes with vibrant red roses placed along the railing
decorative white gazebo with draped fabrics on a lower terrace
multi-story building with orange facades and green roofs adjacent to the balcony

segments.scene_description: Stepping out onto the sunlit balcony, the scene opens to a breathtaking vista of a turquoise lake and snow-capped mountains. Geralt walks along the stone balustrade lined with red roses, passing decorative gazebos and overlooking the terraced buildings below.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase descending to lower courtyard

events.description: beginning descent down the curved stone staircase

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the stone steps while looking down at the courtyard below

entered.detail: wide curved staircase with stone steps and ornate balustrade descending to lower level
decorative hanging sign featuring a cockatrice bird mounted on the building wall
open courtyard area with cobblestones and scattered pedestrians visible below
three-story building with warm orange stucco walls and arched windows
green canvas-covered gazebo structure in the lower courtyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends a grand curved stone staircase, passing a decorative tavern sign mounted on an orange stucco building. The view opens up to a lower plaza with a covered gazebo and scattered pedestrians, while the snow-capped mountain remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway leading to populated courtyard

events.description: entering a covered corridor with orange walls and stone archways
emerging into a populated courtyard area with multiple NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway and emerging into a courtyard, passing by villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in blue and purple clothing leaning against the wall

entered.detail: shaded corridor with orange walls and stone columns connecting the stairs to the courtyard
large stone arch marking the entrance to the main courtyard area
wooden pergola structure with climbing vines providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered corridor with warm orange walls, Geralt passes under a stone archway into a lively courtyard. The area features a lattice pergola with climbing plants, potted flowers, and villagers standing about, including one leaning against the wall near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, intimate interior into the expansive, sun-drenched vistas and bustling public spaces of a Mediterranean-style city. It begins inside a well-appointed room with warm lighting and wooden furniture, moving through the decor before passing through a stained glass door. As the camera steps outside, the scene opens onto a bright balcony overlooking a turquoise lake and snow-capped mountains, gliding along a stone balustrade adorned with red roses. The perspective then descends a grand curved stone staircase past orange stucco walls, shifting from the quiet heights of the balcony toward a lower plaza with scattered pedestrians. Finally, the camera moves through a covered corridor and under a stone archway, emerging into a lively courtyard filled with climbing plants, potted flowers, and villagers.
